title: Official Gazette: Government Appointments, January 2019
reliabilityNotes: Primary government source. Official publication of government appointments. High reliability.

title: Northland Tribune: 'Mersin's Infrastructure Legacy: Contracts and Connections'
reliabilityNotes: Investigative reporting by The Northland Tribune. Bylined by senior investigative reporter. Includes document references. Reliable but represents editorial judgment.

title: NordBuild Construction Ltd — Company Register Entry
reliabilityNotes: Official commercial registry. Lists company officers and directors. High reliability.

title: Citizens for Clean Water — Annual Report 2023
reliabilityNotes: NGO self-publication. Provides information on board composition and activities. Medium reliability — reflects organization's perspective.

title: Ministry of Infrastructure — Contract Award Notice #2019-112
reliabilityNotes: Official government procurement notice. Primary source. High reliability.

title: National Procurement Commission — Review Notice: Contract 2021-047
reliabilityNotes: Official government oversight body. Primary source for procurement review. High reliability.

title: AquaPure Holdings — Annual Report 2022
reliabilityNotes: Company-published document. Lists board members and major shareholders. Medium-high reliability for factual claims about corporate structure.

title: Northland Business Council — 2022 Election Endorsement Press Release
reliabilityNotes: Organization self-publication announcing political endorsement. Medium reliability — reflects organization's official position.

title: Northland Tribune: 'French Diplomat's Role in Northland Water Deals Raises Questions'
reliabilityNotes: Investigative reporting. Cites unnamed sources within the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. Claims disputed by AquaPure Holdings spokesperson. Moderate reliability given disputed claims.

title: Lake Varna Water Treatment Project — Environmental Impact Assessment
reliabilityNotes: Official government-commissioned environmental assessment. High reliability for project scope and contractor information.

title: Northern Highway Expansion — Parliamentary Budget Report 2020
reliabilityNotes: Parliamentary budget oversight report. High reliability for contract values and contractor details.

title: Freedom of Information Response: ClearWater Technologies Ownership Structure
reliabilityNotes: Official FOI disclosure. Contains partially redacted fiduciary records. High reliability for disclosed information, but some ownership details remain redacted.

title: Meridian Capital Partners — Shareholder Register (Public Disclosure)
reliabilityNotes: Regulatory financial disclosure. Required by investment fund regulations. High reliability.

title: Ministry of Foreign Affairs — Official Visitor Logs 2020-2022 (FOI Release)
reliabilityNotes: Official government visitor log data released under FOI. High reliability for confirming meetings, but logs do not record meeting content.

title: Electoral Commission — 2022 Campaign Finance Disclosures
reliabilityNotes: Mandatory electoral finance disclosure. High reliability for disclosed donation amounts and donor categories. Donor identity disclosed at aggregate level.
